prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 1.7L Rootes Group Type 330 (4-cylinder, 79.5mm bore, 82.55mm stroke) with a fully forged internals build using Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Cunningham con-rods, and a billet crankshaft from Cosworth (balanced to 0.0005" tolerance). Pair with a Kent Cams 285-degree duration camshaft (0.450" lift) and titanium retainers from Supertech Performance.

Forced Induction: Install a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3" stainless steel exhaust manifold by Bell Auto Services, mated to a custom air-to-water intercooler (Setrab 40-row core) and a Pierburg 400LPH fuel pump. Tune via a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom maps for 12psi boost (90-octane fuel).

Suspension & Handling: Replace stock leaf springs with a custom 4-link rear setup using polybushings from SuperPro and adjustable coilovers (Bilstein B16 PSS10, 400lb/in front, 350lb/in rear). Fit a Whiteline 22mm adjustable front sway bar and a Quaife ATB helical LSD (3.89:1 final drive) with a close-ratio Getrag 5-speed gearbox (from the Sunbeam Tiger) reinforced with a Fidanza aluminum flywheel.
estetica: Body: Full custom widebody conversion using hand-rolled steel fenders (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear) with a carbon fiber hood (3.5kg weight reduction) from Fibre Glass Developments. Fit a custom front splitter and rear diffuser from Kamei (originally designed for the Rapier but discontinued; reproduced by Rare Spares UK).

Wheels & Tires: 15x8" Minilite-style wheels (ET15 offset) in gold finish from Revolution Wheels, wrapped in 195/50R15 Toyo R888R semi-slick tires. Brake upgrade to 4-pot Wilwood calipers (1.75" pistons) with 11" vented rotors and braided stainless steel lines from Goodridge.

Interior: Full retrim in black Alcantara with red stitching (Recaro SRD bucket seats, 3" narrower than stock), custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter) on a NRG quick-release hub. Gauges: Stack ST800 digital dash with oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR readouts.
